title: BackupResult
description: Schema for the dict returned by run_differential_backup() / backup(). Transient communication — no embedded schema_namespace/schema_version. DESIGN_BACKUP_OPS.md.

ok.description: Whether the backup operation succeeded overall.

backed_up.description: Entries that were successfully backed up.

skipped.description: Entries that were skipped (e.g. bakignore match, already backed up).

errors.description: Fatal error messages. Each string begins with an E_ code.

dry_run.description: Whether this was a dry-run (no files copied).
